questions.question: What is the main content of the four Vedas composed during the Early Vedic period?
Which of the following Jain councils was held at Vallabhi (Gujarat) in 512 CE under the chairmanship of Devardhi Kshamasramana?
Which site provides archaeological evidence of the earliest known urban civilisation in the Indian subcontinent with planned city structures?
During the Gupta period, who was the Commander-in-Chief of the Gupta Army?
During which of the following dynasties was the Kailasa Temple at Ellora built?
Who was the founder of the Mauryan Empire and established a centralised administrative system?
After the fall of Mauryas, which dynasty was established by Pushyamitra Shunga, a commander-in-chief who killed the last Mauryan?
The primary cause for the rise of Jainism and Buddhism was the religious unrest in India in the ______.
Which of the following dynasties initiated the practice of land grants to Brahmanas?
‘Milind Panho’ is a post-Mauryan text which contains the conversations between the Indo-Greek ruler Menander and the scholar and Buddhist monk ___________.
Which of the following kings of Kalinga in the 2ⁿᵈ century B.C. professed Jainism in India?
Which of the following was NOT a reason for the Paleolithic people to move from place to place?
What was the other name of Chandragupta II, the renowned ruler of the Gupta dynasty?
Which of the following is cited as evidence for a highly centralised administration in the Indus-Sarasvati civilisation?
questions.option_3: Absence of seals and standard script

questions.question: Which of the following is/are an ancient set of inscriptions, promoting moral values and governance principles and is considered one of the earliest written records in Indian history?
At what age did Gautama Buddha attain Enlightenment (Nirvana) at Bodh Gaya in Bihar?
During the Later Vedic period, which of the following animals was specifically mentioned as useful for ploughing swampy land?
Which military division had become rare in warfare during the Gupta period despite being part of the army in texts?
During the Indus Valley Civilisation, the presence of jewellery made from precious metals and semi-precious stones in small-town settings supports the argument that ____.
questions.option_2: there was an equal access to material goods
questions.option_3: only the elite had access to luxury items.
questions.option_4: the civilisation was ruled by autocratic priest-kings

questions.question: Which of the following groups of people is said to have migrated into the late Indus Valley era India from Central Asia?
The Visuddhimagga, a key Buddhist text, was written by which of the following scholars?
Which Indo-Greek ruler's envoy Heliodorus installed a pillar in Vidisha and was a devotee of Lord Krishna?
The famous male torso from Harappa, remarkable for its naturalistic pose and chiselled in the round, is made of ___________.
During which period of Indian history were the stupas of Sanchi and Sarnath built, reflecting its architectural style?
The Mauryan empire was founded by Chandragupta Maurya in which of the following years?
